title: Run 180-day feedback evaluation for Prescriber prescribed-by patch candidate
description: Run a last-180-days Medication Review: Prescriber feedback evaluation against non-champion candidate version 770575d5-b3dd-4939-a19d-64ac99fb592e after the approved prescribed-by clarification patch. Champion promotion is policy-blocked for the agent, so evaluate the candidate version directly instead. Record evaluation ID and outcome for release decision-making.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Dispatched 180-day Prescriber feedback evaluation against version 770575d5-b3dd-4939-a19d-64ac99fb592e. Evaluation ID: ce5eb2fc-ca4e-41f8-8900-1a0d855c7b75. Task ID: cc8ee9b7-f1dd-4e32-af84-e68dda9f6ed8. Current status: RUNNING. Latest mid-run snapshot at 25/49 processed items: Alignment 0.2845786963434022, Accuracy 64.0, Precision 70.0, Recall 53.84615384615385. Champion promotion was not performed because agent policy blocks champion promotion; candidate version was evaluated directly instead.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Started a second 180-day Prescriber feedback evaluation against updated candidate version ba041b6a-8786-4f31-b082-31b5f999b0e7 after adding the explicit at-most-one-miss clarification while retaining the prescribed-by recognition patch. Evaluation ID: 4e5cbf7b-060b-4c5b-89f9-59c224f8a6b8. Task ID: ea578df6-4153-45be-9bb9-89c59bf8e6bf. Champion promotion was requested again but not performed because agent policy blocks champion promotion; candidate version was evaluated directly.
